---
title: "Hello, Quarto!"
subtitle: "A modern static site generator"
author: "Strik0r"
date: "2026-05-12"
---

# Hello, Quarto!

Test.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "A simple plot"
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
y = np.sin(x)

plt.plot(x, y)
plt.show()
```
